title: Wool'd
body:
This pack aims to transform almost every texture into a wooly one. However, the pack is in its early stages, so only a few textures have been changed: grass, snow, dirt, stone, ores, tools, and a few mobs.

Currently, textures are from environment, blocks, items, and entities.

## Full list:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  Dirt,
  Grass,
  Grass Block,
  Glass,
  Water,
  Lava,
  Nether Portal,
  Obsidian,
  Stone,
  Coal Ore,
  Copper Ore,
  Cow,
  Pig,
  Chicken,
  Sand,
  Gravel,
  Sun,
  Water Bucket,
  Bedrock,
  Cornflower,
  Dirt Path,
  Gold Block,
  & more
</details>
